text.title: SDD Workflow Overview Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply SDD Workflow Overview end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: write-spec
step.action: Run writing-specifications methodology; spec.md is delta-only when project-spec/ exists. Promote to plan after gate.

step.name: write-plan
step.action: Run plan-md-structure methodology; produce ONE plan.md with `## Design` + `## Execution Plan`. May be skipped for trivial features (≤3 tasks, no new contract).

step.name: execute-tasks
step.action: Materialize tasks under tasks/todo/, then run them per task-creation-parallelization. Conditional: write user-flows.md if user-facing, ui-ux-design.md if UI.

step.name: readiness-gate
step.action: Run readiness-checklist methodology; tick the 10 items in readiness.md with evidence; run rebuild test for project-spec/.

step.name: move-to-done
step.action: Deploy per project-spec/deploy.md, then mv features/in-progress/F0NN/ features/done/F0NN/.
